shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.desc: Learn about delivery options and rates

faq.q1: How do I track my order?
faq.a1: You can track your order in real-time by visiting your account dashboard and clicking on "My Orders". You'll receive email notifications at each stage of your delivery.
faq.a2: We offer a 30-day return policy for most items. Products must be in original condition with all packaging. Simply initiate a return from your account, and we'll provide a prepaid shipping label.
faq.a3: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for 2-3 business days. Shipping times are calculated from the order confirmation date.
faq.a4: Yes, we ship to over 150 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by location. You can check shipping costs at checkout before completing your purchase.
faq.q5: How do I reset my password?
faq.a5: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page and enter your email address. You'll receive a password reset link within minutes. Follow the instructions to create a new password.
faq.a6: Yes, we use industry-standard SSL encryption and PCI DSS compliance to protect your payment information. We never store full credit card details on our servers.

about.heroDesc: We're on a mission to revolutionize how people connect, shop, and share their stories online.
about.missionDesc1: To create a seamless digital marketplace that empowers sellers and delights buyers, fostering a community where quality products and exceptional service thrive.
about.missionDesc2: We believe in democratizing e-commerce, making it accessible to businesses of all sizes while maintaining the highest standards of quality and customer satisfaction.
about.visionDesc1: To become the world's most trusted online marketplace, where innovation meets integrity and every transaction creates value for all stakeholders.
about.visionDesc2: We envision a future where technology enables meaningful connections between people, transcending geographical boundaries and creating opportunities for growth.
about.coreValuesDesc: These principles guide every decision we make and shape our company culture.

values.customerFirstDesc: We prioritize customer needs and satisfaction in every decision we make.
values.innovationDesc: We constantly push boundaries and embrace new technologies and ideas.
values.integrityDesc: We operate with transparency and honesty in all our business dealings.
values.communityDesc: We believe in building strong relationships with our team and customers.

about.teamDesc: Talented individuals united by a shared vision to transform the digital marketplace.
about.ctaDesc: Whether you're a seller looking to grow your business or a buyer seeking quality products, we'd love to have you join us.

teamBios.ceo: Visionary leader with 15+ years in tech entrepreneurship
teamBios.cto: Full-stack engineer passionate about scalable architecture
teamBios.design: Creative designer focused on user-centered experiences
teamBios.ops: Operations expert ensuring smooth business growth
